approvedCatalog.description: Optional local allow/review catalog. Keep it advisory by default so MCPace remains lightweight; turn requireApprovalForUnknown on for stricter teams.

autoProfile.description: Evidence-first server profiling. MCPace derives conservative scheduling from source config, transport, launcher, live initialize/tools-list probes, and optional operator policy overrides; no packaged upstream-server catalog is required.
autoProfile.stateRules: Infer runtimeType/stateClass/effectClass automatically: stateless read-only tools may share; session-stateful memory/context tools bind to chat/session; project-stateful file/git/db tools bind to project/worktree; credential/remote servers bind to credential or transport session; browser/shell/process servers stay exclusive; unknown stdio stays conservative until live probe evidence improves it.

clientCatalog.description: Optional external client target catalog. Built-ins remain a fallback; entries here or MCPACE_CLIENT_CATALOG can add/override clients without recompiling.

dynamicDiscovery.description: One-command dynamic mode. `mcpace auto` refreshes the registry cache when it is missing or stale, selects approved/trusted candidates, writes server config, launches the package manager only during probe, reads live initialize/tools/list evidence, and lets MCPace infer safe runtime policy without asking the user for a server type.

executionDefaults.description: Safe default for unknown local stdio servers: one in-flight call per server until an explicit policy proves stronger concurrency is safe.

mcpSettings.description: Optional additional MCP settings JSON files/directories. Sources are merged in order: mcp_settings.json, default mcp_settings.d/*.json, includePaths/includeDirs, MCPACE_MCP_SETTINGS, then MCPACE_MCP_SETTINGS_DIRS; later duplicate server names override earlier ones.

labs.description: Empty sandbox profile; use it for local experiments by adding explicit serverOverrides.

manual.description: No upstream MCP servers are enabled by default. Add any MCP server to mcp_settings.json; add mcpace.config.json policy only when needed.

serve.description: Advertised Streamable HTTP endpoint. publicUrl overrides local host/port/path for client install/export when a relay or public ingress is used.

uiSurface.description: Local-first operational surface for watching live leases, planned instances, concurrency lanes, and tool-call audit events. Desktop tray can remain a thin launcher later.
